summary: This document contains interview notes with an 81-year-old resident named Sergio Providencia regarding elderly care challenges. He discusses the high cost of 24/7 caregivers, availability of physiotherapy, and the psychological burden of not wanting to be a burden on his children. The notes highlight specific pricing data and preferences regarding nursing homes versus home care.
